overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a third-person perspective of a Space Marine exploring a massive gothic cathedral interior. The character walks through grand halls with checkered marble floors, observes a glowing green holographic star map, views a space vista with planets and Imperial ships, and ascends a grand staircase to an upper level.

moving from initial platform into the wider main corridor

tall ornate stone pillars with intricate gothic detailing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit gothic cathedral corridor with the Space Marine standing alongside two squad mates. The character begins walking forward across the checkered marble floor toward a massive stone staircase in the distance, passing burning braziers that cast flickering orange light against the stone pillars.

approaching the green glowing holographic star map display

entered.detail: large green glowing holographic display showing a solar system with orbital paths
tall stained glass windows with imperial iconography glowing with external light
technological consoles with glowing green displays and candles
large archway leading to the observation deck with space views

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast command hall with high ceilings, leaving the initial staircase behind. The space opens up to reveal a massive green holographic star map glowing in the center, stained glass windows on the left, and an archway leading to an observation deck. A robed servitor stands at a console to the right as the character approaches the holographic display.

events.description: reaching the observation deck with panoramic view of space
turning to face the large windows showing the space vista with planets

agents.ego_description: standing at the observation railing, viewing the imperial fleet and gas giant planets outside

entered.detail: ornate gothic metal railing along the edge of the observation deck
panoramic view of space with gas giant planets and imperial battle cruisers
large wooden desk with candles, scrolls, and technical equipment

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the observation deck, where the space vista becomes visible through massive gothic windows. The view shows a stunning scene of space with gas giants and Imperial cruisers. The character turns to observe the view, moving past the holographic star map which is now to the left, while standing near an ornate railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through command center toward grand stairs

events.description: turning back toward the main hall entrance and staircase
re-entering the corridor area with the grand staircase visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking back through the cathedral, passing other space marines and approaching the grand staircase

notable_agents.action: robed figure in red robes standing near the railing

entered.detail: massive stone staircase leading upward to the upper levels

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the observation deck and walks back through the command center, leaving the space vista and holographic map behind. The character approaches the grand staircase which becomes more prominent in the center of the frame, passing a robed figure while other space marines walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper cathedral stairs leading to elevator platform

gothic wall-mounted candle sconces providing dim illumination
intricate circular metal emblem set into the floor at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase, leaving the checkered floor below. The lighting becomes darker with only wall sconces providing illumination. Upon reaching the top, the character approaches a circular elevator platform with an ornate floor emblem, where another space marine stands guard near the entrance to the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit gothic cathedral that gradually opens into a vast, luminous command center overlooking deep space. It begins in a narrow corridor where a Space Marine and his squad walk across checkered marble floors, passing burning braziers that cast flickering orange light against stone pillars. As the character moves forward, the corridor expands into a massive command hall featuring high ceilings, stained glass windows, and a glowing green holographic star map tended by a robed servitor. The scene then shifts toward an observation deck, moving past the holographic display to reveal a stunning vista of gas giants and Imperial cruisers through towering gothic windows. Finally, the camera settles near an ornate railing as the character turns to observe the celestial expanse.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit command center toward the shadowed upper reaches of a gothic cathedral. It begins as the character turns away from a holographic map and space vista, walking back through the hall and passing robed figures and other Space Marines. As the character approaches the center of the frame, the scene shifts toward a grand staircase that leads away from the checkered marble floors. The lighting gradually darkens during the ascent, with the environment becoming illuminated only by flickering wall sconces. Finally, the camera reaches the top of the stairs and moves toward a circular elevator platform featuring an ornate floor emblem and a guarding Space Marine.
